search.query: | inputlookup interfaces_20003_lookup | lookup `is_local_lookup` nfo_vpc_name_lookup vpc_name as SNMPDeviceName OUTPUT exp_ip as vpc_exp_ip | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT management_ip | eval management_ip = if(management_ip=="Unassigned", exp_ip, mvindex(management_ip, 0) ) | lookup `is_local_lookup` interfaces_lookup nfo_hostname management_ip snmp_index as ifIndex OUTPUT if_name as ifname_interfaces | eval final_interface = if(ifname_interfaces=="unknown",ifName,ifname_interfaces) | eval final_interface = if(ifName!="",ifIndex." ( ".final_interface." )",ifIndex) | table exp_ip final_interface ifIndex vpc_exp_ip | eval vpc_id_search=if("$vpc_id$"=="*","null",vpc_exp_ip) | where exp_ip=vpc_id_search | dedup ifIndex final_interface | appendpipe [ stats count | eval ifIndex="*" | where count==0 | fields - count ]

`netflow_search_rule_20267` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" vpc_id="$vpc_id$" | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_vpc by vpc_name vpc_id nfo_hostname | search $advanced_filter$ interface_id="$ENI$" | fillnull value="" transport src_host src_inst_id src_inst_name dest_host dest_inst_id dest_inst_name src_region dest_region src_service dest_service | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count by interface_id nfo_hostname vpc_id vpc_name src_ip src_inst_id src_inst_name src_port src_host dest_ip dest_inst_id dest_inst_name dest_port dest_host src_region dest_region src_service dest_service transport protocol_id sum_by_vpc _time
| strcat vpc_name "/" vpc_id "/" interface_id vpc_interface | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by vpc_interface,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin by vpc_name vpc_id sum_by_vpc interface_id _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as Max min(avgbits) as Min stdev(avgbits) as StDev by vpc_name vpc_id sum_by_vpc interface_id nfo_hostname | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | strcat vpc_name "/" vpc_id "/" interface_id vpc_interface | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval MaxTraffic=Max/1000000 | eval MinTraffic=Min/1000000 | eval StDev = StDev/1000000 | eval p95=p95/1000000 | sort - TrafficSpeed | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_vpc | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Min Mbps, MinTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Standard Deviation Mbps, StDev, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | table nfo_hostname vpc_interface "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Min Mbps" "Standard Deviation Mbps" "Average Mbps" pct "Average Packets/s" | rename vpc_interface as "VPC/Interface" | rename pct as "% of Total" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20267` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" vpc_id="$vpc_id$" | fillnull value="" transport src_host src_inst_id src_inst_name dest_host dest_inst_id dest_inst_name src_region dest_region src_service dest_service | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_vpc by vpc_name vpc_id nfo_hostname | search $advanced_filter$ interface_id="$ENI$" | bin _time $notbase_span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count by interface_id nfo_hostname vpc_id vpc_name src_ip src_inst_id src_inst_name src_port src_host dest_ip dest_inst_id dest_inst_name dest_port dest_host src_region dest_region src_service dest_service transport protocol_id sum_by_vpc _time | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin by vpc_name vpc_id sum_by_vpc interface_id _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($notbase_span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as Max min(avgbits) as Min stdev(avgbits) as StDev by vpc_name vpc_id sum_by_vpc interface_id nfo_hostname | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$notbase_range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$notbase_range$ | strcat vpc_name "/" vpc_id "/" interface_id vpc_interface | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval MaxTraffic=Max/1000000 | eval MinTraffic=Min/1000000 | eval StDev = StDev/1000000 | eval p95=p95/1000000 | sort - TrafficSpeed | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_vpc | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Min Mbps, MinTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Standard Deviation Mbps, StDev, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | table nfo_hostname vpc_interface "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Min Mbps" "Standard Deviation Mbps" "Average Mbps" pct "Average Packets/s" | rename vpc_interface as "VPC/Interface" | rename pct as "% of Total" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

| strcat vpc_name "/" vpc_id "/" interface_id vpc_interface | search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" vpc_interface="$VPC_Interface$" | fillnull value="" src_host dest_host transport | `aws_conversation_basesearch(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20267` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" vpc_id="$vpc_id$" nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_vpc by vpc_id nfo_hostname | fillnull value="" transport src_host src_inst_id src_inst_name dest_host dest_inst_id dest_inst_name src_region dest_region src_service dest_service | search $advanced_filter$ interface_id="$ENI$" | strcat vpc_name "/" vpc_id "/" interface_id vpc_interface | search vpc_interface="$VPC_Interface$" | `aws_conversation(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10267: AWS Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20267). This Module identifies AWS EC2 instances with the most traffic. It consolidates VPC Flow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. This Module is packaged in NFO “AWS VPC Flow Logs” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
